metadata.title: CryptoGuide
metadata.description: AI-powered real-time crypto market insights — prices, news, briefings and on-chain data in one place

privacy.title: Privacy & Data
privacy.exportDescription: Download everything stored on your account as a JSON file (data portability).
privacy.exportError: Could not export your data. Please try again shortly.
privacy.deleteDescription: Permanently deletes your account and all related data. This cannot be undone. Type DELETE to confirm.
privacy.deleteError: Could not delete your account. Please try again shortly.

map.title: Crypto Map
map.subtitle: Explore merchants, ATMs and online services that accept crypto, plus per-country regulation status.
map.disclaimer: This map is for informational purposes only and does not broker transactions. Merchant and ATM data comes from third parties (BTCMap/OpenStreetMap) and is not guaranteed to be accurate or current; per-country regulation status is for reference only and is not legal advice. You are responsible for your own visits, transactions and regulatory compliance.
map.zoomInHint: Zoom in to load merchants and ATMs.
map.capped: Too many results — zoom in for a more precise view.
map.noOnline: No online services match the filters.
map.legendNote: Regulation status is a reference summary, not legal advice. Actual rules vary by jurisdiction and change frequently.
map.geoUnavailable: Location is not available in this browser.
map.geoDenied: Location permission was denied, so we can't move to your area.
map.geoFallbackCountry: Location permission is off, so we moved to your country's approximate position. Allow location in your browser's site permissions for a precise view.
map.geoFallbackDefault: Location permission is off, so we moved to a default position. Allow location in your browser's site permissions for a precise view.
map.noResults: No registered places in this area. Pan the map to explore other regions.

apiCenter.title: API Center
apiCenter.subtitle: Integrate CryptoGuide data via REST API and webhooks. Exclusive to the Legendary plan.
apiCenter.terms: All data served by the API is informational only and is not investment advice. Redistribution, resale, or public re-publication is prohibited; every response carries the same terms in its meta field.
apiCenter.secretOnce: This value is shown only once. Store it somewhere safe.
apiCenter.webhookSigning: Every webhook request includes an x-cryptoguide-signature header (HMAC-SHA256). Verify it with the secret issued at registration.
apiCenter.docsPrices: BTC/ETH/SOL USD quotes (resilient fetcher, includes staleness flag)
apiCenter.docsBriefs: Latest published AI Market Brief (detailed tier, AI-generated label)
apiCenter.rateLimitNote: Rate limit: 60 requests per minute per key. Exceeding it returns 429 with a Retry-After header.
apiCenter.metaNote: Every response includes a meta field with the disclaimer and usage terms (no redistribution).

referral.title: Referral Program
referral.subtitle: Invite friends with your referral link and earn a commission when they start a paid plan.
referral.disclaimer: Referral rewards are reviewed only when the referred member starts a paid subscription, and are voided if abuse is detected (self-referral, duplicate accounts, etc.). Program terms may change with prior notice.
referral.regionBlocked: Monetary rewards are not offered in your region pending regulatory review. Your referral link and the ranking remain available.
referral.howItWorks: When a friend visits through your link, signs up within 30 days, and starts a paid plan, it counts as a conversion. Commission is 10% of the first paid plan's monthly price.
referral.rewardsUnavailable: Monetary rewards are disabled in your region.

alerts.title: Realtime Alerts
alerts.subtitle: Set price, whale, pattern, and macro conditions — we notify you when the event occurs.
alerts.disclaimer: Alerts are informational notices that a condition you configured has occurred. They do not instruct any trading action and do not guarantee investment outcomes; all investment decisions and responsibility remain yours.
alerts.noRules: No rules yet — create your first one on the left.
alerts.pushHint: Browser push activates in the deployed environment. In-app alerts work immediately with no setup.

education.title: Education
education.subtitle: Crypto fundamentals taught level by level — from trading basics to psychology.

trading.name: Trading Basics
trading.description: Understand how trading works — exchanges, orders, liquidity, derivatives.

technical.name: Technical Analysis
technical.description: From reading charts to interpreting patterns probabilistically.

risk.name: Risk Management
risk.description: Volatility, position sizing and risk metrics — the principles of managing losses.

psychology.name: Psychology
psychology.description: How biases and emotions distort decisions, and frameworks to counter them.

education.gateAuthDescription: This lesson unlocks with a free account. Beginner lessons stay open without signing in.
education.gatePlanTitle: This lesson opens with the Standard plan
education.gatePlanDescription: Advanced lessons are for Standard subscribers and above. Beginner and intermediate lessons remain free.
education.note: This educational content explains concepts for informational purposes — it is not investment advice or a recommendation to take any action.

reports.title: Premium Research
reports.subtitle: ETF / Macro / On-chain research reports published weekly, monthly and quarterly.
reports.disclaimer: These reports are AI-generated, pass an automated expression review, and are non-personalized informational content — not investment advice or a solicitation to trade. You are solely responsible for your own investment decisions.

patterns.title: AI Pattern
patterns.subtitle: Automatic detection of chart patterns and support/resistance levels from candle data.
patterns.disclaimer: Pattern detections on this page are non-personalized information served identically to all users — not investment advice or a solicitation to trade. No trade instructions (entry, target, or stop levels) are provided.
patterns.confidenceNote: Confidence is a SHAPE-match score for the detected pattern — not a prediction of price direction or outcome.
patterns.empty: Nothing detected in the current window.
patterns.unavailable: Candle data is unavailable. Please try again shortly.

onchain.title: Whale & On-chain
onchain.subtitle: Large transactions, exchange flows and network activity at a glance.
onchain.whaleSubtitle: Recent large Bitcoin transactions (Blockchair $5M+; falls back to largest mempool txs)
onchain.flowMethod: Estimate based on a mempool sample of large transactions ({matched} of {sample} matched) against a public exchange-wallet list. Actual total flows may differ.
onchain.sources: Data: Blockchair · blockchain.info · CoinGecko. Informational purposes only; delays and inaccuracies possible.

brief.title: AI Market Brief
brief.subtitle: A daily market briefing generated automatically from market data and the latest news.
brief.disclaimer: This briefing is AI-generated content for informational and educational purposes only. It is not investment advice or a solicitation to trade. You are solely responsible for your own investment decisions and their outcomes.
brief.notPublished: No briefing has been published yet. Please check back soon.

news.title: News
news.subtitle: Real-time crypto news balanced across US, European and Asian sources, with AI summaries.
news.sentimentMethod: based on {count} articles from the last 24h
news.sentimentDisclaimer: Derived from news-headline tone analysis — not an investment signal.
news.summaryHeld: Summary held — did not pass quality checks

portfolioAnalytics.hhiExplain: HHI (Herfindahl index) sums the squares of each asset's weight — a measure of how concentrated the portfolio is in a few assets. Higher values indicate higher concentration. (Shown as diversified below 0.15 · concentrated above 0.25.)
portfolioAnalytics.effectiveExplain: Effective assets (1/HHI) expresses the current allocation as the equivalent number of equally-weighted assets.
portfolioAnalytics.aiEmpty: Generate an educational explanation of your current diversification metrics.
portfolioAnalytics.aiBlocked: The generated commentary did not pass the no-advice expression check and was not shown. Please try again.
portfolioAnalytics.aiFailed: Generation failed. Please try again shortly.
portfolioAnalytics.aiDisclaimer: This commentary is an educational explanation of the metrics only — not investment advice, a rebalancing recommendation, or a solicitation to trade. Interpretation and all decisions remain yours.

brief.title: AI Market Brief
brief.subtitle: Every morning, AI summarizes what is moving the market. Below is a sample preview.
brief.headline: Daily Market Briefing — Sample
brief.generatedNote: Published daily at 08:00 KST · The content below is a format example
brief.p1: Bitcoin continues to trade in a narrow range around key moving averages, with derivatives positioning observed to be close to neutral.
brief.p2: On-chain activity across Ethereum layer-2 networks keeps rising, extending the growth in ecosystem-wide usage metrics.
brief.p3: Macro calendar: with the US CPI release due this week, broader market volatility may increase and warrants attention.
brief.disclaimer: This briefing is an automatically generated summary for informational purposes only and is not investment advice or a solicitation to trade any asset.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Answers to the questions we hear most.

q1.question: What is CryptoGuide?
q1.answer: A crypto market information platform that brings real-time prices, AI news digests, daily market briefings and on-chain data together in one place.

q2.question: Do you provide investment advice?
q2.answer: No. CryptoGuide is an informational service and does not provide investment advice, trade solicitation or asset management. All decisions and their consequences are your own responsibility.

q3.question: Is the price data real-time?
q3.answer: We stream public data from global exchanges over WebSocket, updating second by second. Slight delays may occur depending on network conditions.

q4.question: How do billing and cancellation work?
q4.answer: All plans are billed monthly in USD and can be cancelled anytime. After cancelling, you keep access until the end of the current billing period.

q5.question: Can I change plans later?
q5.answer: Yes — upgrade or downgrade anytime; the difference is applied to your next bill.

q6.question: Do you offer an API?
q6.answer: The API Center is available on the Legendary plan, together with data export.

globalDisclaimer.title: Important notice
items: CryptoGuide provides AI-powered market analysis and educational content only.
Nothing on this website constitutes financial, investment, tax, or legal advice.
Trading cryptocurrencies involves substantial risk. You may lose some or all of your capital.
Past performance does not guarantee future results.
CryptoGuide does not provide investment advisory services and is not registered as an investment adviser in any jurisdiction.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.subtitle: The terms that govern your use of CryptoGuide.
terms.intro: These Terms of Service (the "Terms") govern your use of the website and related services (the "Service") provided by CryptoGuide (the "Company"). By using the Service you agree to these Terms.

sections.heading: 1. Acceptance and scope
sections.body: By registering for or using the Service you are deemed to have agreed to these Terms. The Company may amend these Terms to the extent permitted by law, with prior notice of any changes.

sections.heading: 2. The Service
sections.body: The Company provides informational and educational services including AI-powered market analysis, news summaries, market briefings, on-chain data and educational content. All content is non-personalized general information and is not individualized investment advice or a solicitation to trade for any particular user.

sections.heading: 3. Eligibility
sections.body: You must have the legal capacity (including age) to use the Service in your jurisdiction and are responsible for complying with applicable law. Some features may be unavailable in restricted regions.

sections.heading: 4. Accounts and security
sections.body: You are responsible for keeping your account credentials secure and for all activity under your account. Authentication is handled through Clerk.

sections.heading: 5. Subscriptions and billing
sections.body: Billing, automatic renewal, plan changes, withdrawal and refunds for paid subscriptions are governed by the separate Refund Policy. All prices are in US dollars (USD).

sections.heading: 6. Acceptable use
sections.body: You may not copy, redistribute or resell the Service or its content without authorization, access it through automated means excessively, or use it in violation of applicable law or third-party rights.

sections.heading: 7. Intellectual property
sections.body: All intellectual property rights in the Service and its content belong to the Company or its licensors. You are granted only a limited license for personal, non-commercial use.

sections.heading: 8. Third-party services and data
sections.body: The Service relies on third parties for authentication (Clerk), payments (Stripe), AI (Anthropic) and market/on-chain data. The accuracy and timeliness of third-party data are not guaranteed.

sections.heading: 9. Disclaimers and limitation of liability
sections.body: The Service is provided "as is". To the maximum extent permitted by law, the Company does not warrant the accuracy or fitness for a particular purpose of any information. See the Disclaimer for details.

sections.heading: 10. Changes and termination
sections.body: The Company may change or discontinue all or part of the Service, and you may cancel your subscription and stop using the Service at any time.

sections.heading: 11. Governing law and disputes
sections.body: Interpretation and application of these Terms are subject to the jurisdiction-specific notices below; mandatory rights and forums granted to you by law are not limited.

regions.intro: Depending on where you reside, the following also applies.

us.heading: United States users
us.body: The content is for informational and educational purposes and is not a solicitation or offer to buy or sell securities. The Company is not registered as an investment adviser under the U.S. Investment Advisers Act of 1940 and does not provide individualized investment advice.

eu.heading: EU users
eu.body: The Company is not an authorized crypto-asset service provider (CASP) under the Markets in Crypto-Assets Regulation (MiCA), and the Service is not the provision or marketing of regulated crypto-asset services. Processing of personal data is subject to the GDPR (see the Privacy Policy).

kr.heading: Republic of Korea users
kr.body: The Service is an informational and educational service that does not constitute investment advisory or discretionary investment business under the Financial Investment Services and Capital Markets Act. The Company does not provide individualized consultation and provides the same information to an unspecified audience.

terms.related: Subscription billing, automatic renewal, withdrawal and refunds are governed by the separate Refund Policy.
terms.statutory: Nothing in these Terms excludes or limits any rights guaranteed to you under mandatory law.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: What personal data we process, why, how long we keep it, and your rights.
privacy.intro: The Company values your personal data and complies with applicable data-protection laws, including the Korean Personal Information Protection Act (PIPA) and, where applicable, the GDPR. This policy explains what personal data we collect and use, third-party sharing, retention and your rights.

sections.heading: 1. Personal data we collect
sections.body: Account details (email, name, profile image via Clerk), consent records (timestamp, IP, user-agent), payment data (Stripe customer/subscription identifiers — card data is held by Stripe), portfolios and watchlists, referral relationships and a hashed signup IP, API keys (hashed), and service access/usage records.

sections.heading: 2. Purposes of use
sections.body: We use personal data for member management and authentication, billing/renewal/refunds of paid subscriptions, providing and improving the Service, meeting legal obligations (such as consent evidence), and preventing abuse (such as referral-fraud detection).

sections.heading: 3. Legal bases
sections.body: We process personal data on the bases permitted by applicable law, including performance of a contract, your consent, legal obligations and legitimate interests.

sections.heading: 4. Sharing and processors
sections.body: To provide the Service we engage processors for authentication (Clerk), payments (Stripe), AI processing (Anthropic), hosting/CDN and email. When AI processing is used, personally identifying data is minimized.

sections.heading: 5. International transfers
sections.body: Some processors are located outside your country; where this occurs we apply the safeguards required by law. The details of international transfers will be finalized and disclosed in the pre-launch legal review.

sections.heading: 6. Retention and deletion
sections.body: Personal data is deleted without undue delay once its purpose is achieved or you close your account, except where a legal retention obligation applies. On account deletion, related data is cascade-deleted.

sections.heading: 7. Your rights
sections.body: You may request access, correction, deletion, restriction and portability of your personal data. You can export your data (portability) and delete your account (erasure) directly from your profile page.

sections.heading: 8. Cookies
sections.body: We use the minimum necessary cookies for keeping you signed in, language preference and referral attribution.

sections.heading: 9. Security
sections.body: We apply technical and organizational measures such as access control, transport encryption and IP hashing to process personal data securely.

sections.heading: 10. Children
sections.body: The Service does not target children below the minimum age set by applicable law and does not knowingly collect their personal data.

regions.intro: Depending on where you reside, the following also applies.

us.heading: United States (California) users
us.body: California residents have the right under the CCPA/CPRA to know the categories of personal data collected, to request deletion, and to opt out of sale/sharing. The Company does not sell personal data.

eu.heading: EU/EEA users
eu.body: Under the GDPR the Company acts as data controller and states its legal bases; you have the rights of access, rectification, erasure, restriction, portability and objection, and the right to lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority.

kr.heading: Republic of Korea users
kr.body: Under PIPA the Company discloses the items, purposes, retention period, processing consignment and cross-border transfer of personal data, and you may request access, correction, deletion and suspension of processing.

privacy.statutory: Where this policy conflicts with mandatory law, that law prevails; cross-border transfer and retention details are finalized in the pre-launch legal review.

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer
disclaimer.subtitle: The nature of the Service and the risks involved.
disclaimer.intro: This Disclaimer clarifies the nature and limits of the CryptoGuide Service. Please read it carefully before using the Service.

sections.heading: 1. Nature of the Service
sections.body: CryptoGuide provides AI-powered market analysis and educational content only. Nothing on this website constitutes financial, investment, tax, or legal advice.

sections.heading: 2. No advisory relationship
sections.body: The Company does not provide investment advisory services and is not registered as an investment adviser in any jurisdiction. Using the Service does not create any advisory, fiduciary or agency relationship between you and the Company.

sections.heading: 3. AI-generated content
sections.body: AI-generated summaries, briefings and pattern analysis are labeled as AI-generated and may be inaccurate. The "confidence" in pattern analysis reflects the degree of shape match, not a prediction of price direction, and briefings are non-personalized information, not tailored to any individual.

sections.heading: 4. Investment risk
sections.body: Trading cryptocurrencies involves substantial risk. You may lose some or all of your capital. You are solely responsible for your own investment decisions and their outcomes.

sections.heading: 5. No guarantee of results
sections.body: Past performance does not guarantee future results. The Company does not guarantee any investment outcome or return.

sections.heading: 6. Third-party data
sections.body: Prices, news and on-chain data in the Service are sourced from third parties, and their accuracy, completeness and timeliness are not guaranteed.

regions.intro: Depending on where you reside, the following notices also apply.

us.heading: United States users (SEC)
us.body: CryptoGuide is not an investment adviser under the U.S. Investment Advisers Act of 1940 and is not registered as an investment adviser with the SEC or any state authority. The content is not a solicitation or offer to buy or sell securities or investment products and does not constitute individualized investment advice.

eu.heading: EU users (MiCA)
eu.body: CryptoGuide is not an authorized crypto-asset service provider (CASP) under the Markets in Crypto-Assets Regulation (MiCA). The content is not investment advice on crypto-assets or marketing of regulated services and is provided for informational and educational purposes only.

kr.heading: Republic of Korea users (Capital Markets Act)
kr.body: The Service is an informational and educational service that does not constitute investment advisory or discretionary investment business under the Financial Investment Services and Capital Markets Act. The Company does not provide individualized consultation and provides the same information to an unspecified audience.

disclaimer.statutory: Nothing in this Disclaimer excludes or limits any rights guaranteed to you under mandatory law.

refund.title: Refund Policy
refund.subtitle: How subscription billing, automatic renewal, withdrawal and refunds work.
refund.intro: This Refund Policy governs billing, automatic renewal, withdrawal of subscription and refunds for the paid subscription services provided by CryptoGuide (the "Company"). It forms part of the Company's Terms of Service and does not limit any consumer rights guaranteed by applicable consumer-protection laws, including the Korean Act on the Consumer Protection in Electronic Commerce.

sections.heading: 1. Automatic renewal and advance notice
sections.body: Unless cancelled, every paid subscription renews automatically at the end of each billing cycle and is charged to your registered payment method. The Company sends an email 3 days before the renewal date stating that the subscription will renew and the amount that will be charged.

sections.heading: 2. Free trial
sections.body: New subscriptions include a 7-day free trial. If you cancel during the trial, you are not charged anything. When the trial ends, the subscription automatically converts to a paid subscription and the first charge is made.

sections.heading: 3. Monthly subscriptions
sections.body: Monthly subscriptions are non-refundable. If you cancel, access is not stopped immediately; you may continue to use the service until the end of the current billing period you have already paid for. At the end of the period the subscription ends without renewing.

sections.heading: 4. Annual subscriptions
sections.body: Annual subscriptions are non-refundable as a rule. However, a full refund is available only when the request is made within 14 days of the payment date AND the service has not actually been used (no usage records such as signing in and viewing content). Refunds are not available once 14 days have passed or once there is any record of service use.

sections.heading: 5. Plan changes (upgrade / downgrade)
sections.body: An upgrade to a higher plan takes effect immediately and only the prorated difference for the remaining billing period is charged. A downgrade to a lower plan does not affect the current billing period and applies from the next billing date; no separate refund is provided for a downgrade.

sections.heading: 6. Limits on withdrawal for digital content
sections.body: This service is informational digital content. Under applicable law, including Article 17(2) of the Korean Act on the Consumer Protection in Electronic Commerce, the right to withdraw a subscription may be restricted to the extent permitted by law once provision of the content has begun. Where withdrawal is restricted, the Company clearly indicates this and provides trial use (the free trial) as required by applicable law.

sections.heading: 7. Refunds for cryptocurrency (USDC) payments
sections.body: Where payment was made in cryptocurrency such as USDC, refunds are issued only to the wallet address originally used for the payment. Refunds to a different wallet address are not provided, and network fees at the time of the refund may be deducted. The Company is not responsible for losses caused by the user, such as entering an incorrect wallet address.

refund.how: You can request a refund directly from the subscription management page or through our customer support channel. Eligibility for an annual-subscription refund is determined based on the payment date and service-usage records.
refund.statutory: Nothing in this policy excludes or limits any rights guaranteed to you under applicable law. Where this policy conflicts with mandatory law, that law prevails.

footer.disclaimer: All information on this site is provided for general informational purposes only and does not constitute investment advice, a solicitation to buy or sell any financial product, or legal/tax advice. Investing in crypto assets involves the risk of principal loss; you are solely responsible for your own investment decisions and their outcomes.
